library.desc: The tskb package itself — its CLI, JSX runtime, and types for writing docs.

cli.desc: The command-line tool shipped by the package. Run as `tskb` after install. Builds the graph, runs queries, opens the explorer.

jsxRuntime.desc: A custom JSX runtime that turns .tskb.tsx files into a knowledge graph instead of DOM. Picked up by the docs tsconfig via `jsxImportSource: "tskb"`.

registry.desc: The global `namespace tskb` where Folders, Modules, Exports, and Terms are declared. All .tskb.tsx files share one registry — declarations merge across files.

graph.desc: The output of the build: every node (folder, module, export, term, doc, flow) and the edges between them. Written to `.tskb/graph/` as separate JSON files, one per node type.

knowledgeChunk.desc: A JSON piece of the graph the SPA loads on demand. The meta chunk holds top-level info; one folder chunk per folder holds its contents.

explorerLane.desc: A horizontal band on the explorer canvas. Lanes group different kinds of nodes side by side.

nodeComponent.desc: The interface a node type implements to render itself on the canvas.

lruChunkCache.desc: A bounded cache inside the SPA. Keeps recently loaded chunks; drops the oldest when full.

explorerStaticExport.desc: A self-contained explorer folder that opens directly from the file system, no server needed.

ghostNode.desc: A placeholder node for a folder or file that exists on disk but isn't declared in the graph. Drawn as a faded card.

searchIndexChunk.desc: A flat array of all graph nodes with just the fields needed for search (id, type, label, description, path). Served at /chunks/search-index.json and fetched once by the search worker.

tsProgram.desc: A TypeScript compiler `Program` built from source files and a tsconfig. tskb uses it to read the AST, types, and symbols of your code — without emitting JavaScript.

ast.desc: Abstract Syntax Tree. TypeScript's tree shape of source code.

declarationMerging.desc: TypeScript's rule that merges declarations with the same name. Lets the registry be split across files.

typeChecker.desc: TypeScript's component that resolves types and gives type info for symbols.

literalType.desc: A type that represents one specific value, like the string `'hello'`. Used to read constants out of type definitions.

jsxElement.desc:
A JSX node in the source tree, like `` or `

`.

typeAssertion.desc: TypeScript's `as` syntax. tskb uses it to point a `ref` at a registry entry: `ref as tskb.Modules['X']`.

depthFirstTraversal.desc: Tree traversal that follows each branch to its end before moving to the next. Used to walk JSX in order.

constantReferencesMap.desc: A lookup from each `const` in a doc file to the registry node it points to.

refCategoryMap.desc: A lookup from a JSX tag name to the registry category it belongs to.

globPattern.desc: A file-matching pattern like `**/*.tskb.tsx`. Used to pick which doc files to build.

tskbOutputDir.desc: The `.tskb/` folder. Holds the build output: a `graph/` directory with per-type JSON files.

searchResult.desc: A match returned by `tskb search`. A node plus a score from 0 to 1; higher means a better match.

resolvedVia.desc: How `resolveNode` found a match: by exact ID, by path, or by walking up to the nearest parent folder.
